description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/ercom/docker:17.12.0-ce-git with a Docker-in-Docker service registry.gitlab.com/ercom/docker:17.12.0-ce-dind (alias docker) and the tag 'docker' on all jobs. Define three stages: build, mksquashfs, and deploy. Add a hidden .target-build-template job in the build stage that runs the script tools/gitlab-ci/run.sh, sets variables CITBX_JOB_RUN_FILE_NAME=target-build.sh, DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay, DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375, and can be used as a template. Add a hidden .target-mksquashfs-template job in the mksquashfs stage that runs the same script, sets CITBX_JOB_RUN_FILE_NAME=target-mksquashfs.sh, DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay, DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375, and stores the directory 'artifacts' as an artifact that expires in 1 day. Add a bootp-registry job in the build stage that runs tools/gitlab-ci/run.sh, uses the same image and service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER and DOCKER_HOST variables, and is limited to branches matching the regex ^bootp-registry/.*$. Add a target-base-build job in the build stage that also runs tools/gitlab-ci/run.sh, uses the same image and service, inherits the variables from .target-build-template, and is limited to branches matching ^target-base/.*$.
